pi_items.source: Verified by checking setup_task.sh which calls setup_task_project with 'suspect_link', resulting in a project folder named 'suspect_link_project'.
Verified by inspecting ExampleProject/project.json and setup_task.sh which targets SRS.json.
Verified by inspecting ExampleProject/project.json and setup_task.sh which targets NEEDS.json.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic ReqView demo project cloned into a directory named 'suspect_link_project'. The project contains a 'NEEDS' document and an 'SRS' document. A script programmatically alters the text of a requirement in NEEDS, causing an existing traceability link in SRS to become 'suspect' due to a timestamp mismatch. The agent is expected to find this suspect link in the SRS document and clear it without deleting the link or reverting the upstream text change.
